subcodes.first_line: O my heavenly companions! The honoured Nadim is now both confidant and companion, and requesteth the writing of this letter [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یاران رحمانی من جناب ندیم الان همدم و ندیمند و خواهش نگارش این نامه نمایند
subcodes.subjects: @health and healing; material and spiritual healing, @prayer for healing, @words vs deeds, @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world
